meaning: adv.斜地,成十字状地,交叉地
examples: A crosswise street; the crosswise dimension.
Cut the dough crosswise into four equal pieces.
Place smaller sticks crosswise to make a lattice effect.
After halving the baguette lengthwise, cut it crosswise into quarters, to produce eight bread segments.
The papers, they said, had been folded twice in the same direction, instead of lengthwise and then crosswise, as most voters folded them.
